summary: Addresses external review #5 feedback: CEL XValidation rule for CacheSpec updated from `has(self.servers)` to `has(self.servers) && size(self.servers) > 0` to match webhook semantics for empty arrays. New review pattern documented. However, the CRD YAML was not regenerated after the CEL rule change.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (`make test OPERATOR=keystone` exits 0)
Edge cases covered (defaulting, validation, cron, duplicates, policy)
Generated files in sync (`make manifests` produces no diff)

code_quality_checklist.item: CEL rule semantically equivalent to webhook validation

security_checklist.item: All user inputs validated at CRD boundary (CEL + webhook)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
CEL and Go validation layers agree on accept/reject for all input states

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early via CRD-level and webhook validation

defensive_checklist.item: Defense-in-depth: CEL + webhook both validate cache mutual exclusivity

issues_found.description: CRD YAML is out of sync with keystone_types.go. The committed CRD still has the old CEL rule `has(self.clusterRef) != has(self.servers)` while the types file was updated to `(self.clusterRef != null) != (has(self.servers) && size(self.servers) > 0)`. Running `make manifests` produces a diff.
issues_found.fix: Run `make manifests` and commit the updated CRD YAML file `operators/keystone/config/crd/bases/keystone.openstack.c5c3.io_keystones.yaml`.

next_steps: Run `make manifests` to regenerate `operators/keystone/config/crd/bases/keystone.openstack.c5c3.io_keystones.yaml` with the updated CEL rule, then commit the result

metadata.title: E001: Add Keystone API types, webhooks & CRD generation

verification_commands.test: make test OPERATOR=keystone — PASSED (all tests green)
verification_commands.manifests_sync: make manifests — FAILED (1 file changed: CRD YAML out of sync)

metadata.external_review_addressed: greptile-apps[bot] review #5 — CEL/webhook semantic mismatch for CacheSpec.Servers empty array
